positive: An intricate, stylized geometric constellation map overlaid onto a deep indigo gradient background. The main subject is a symmetrical 'infinity loop' nebula formed by glowing cyan and electric violet lines, representing cosmic energy. The composition must be central and balanced, with star points rendered as crisp, glowing white dots and lines radiating outwards in perfect, repeating patterns. Use a Neo-Art Deco celestial aesthetic with clean silhouettes and a high contrast ratio. The style should be graphic, vector-like, and suitable for screen printing on a dark garment. Highly detailed, vaporwave glow, ultra-sharp, symmetry, cosmic geometry, dark fantasy, luminous lines, high saturation.
